title: Aluna's Pocket Realms
description: Adds personal pocket dimensions accessed via tiered keys. Create your own private rooms for storage, farming, or customization!
body:
Pocket Realms is a mod that introduces magical Keys granting access to personalized instanced rooms. These are miniature private dimensions where players can build, store items, or create farms safely away from the main world. Each Key corresponds to a tier, such as Coal, Iron, or Gold, determining the size and capacity of the pocket realm.​

These realms are saved uniquely per Key, ensuring player ownership and persistence across sessions. Crafted through decently expensive recipes combining tier-specific materials and rare items with a special Realm Core, these Keys offer a rewarding progression system for players seeking secure, customizable personal spaces. Whether used for compact storage, tranquil farming, or creative experimentation, Pocket Realms expands gameplay with versatile, pocket-sized worlds tailored to each player’s needs.
